---
title: "_Geographic Information Analysis_"
subtitle: "Supporting material"
listing:
  contents: 
  - posts/2025/08/31/gia-chapter-1A
  - posts/2025/09/09/gia-chapter-1B-part-1
  - posts/2025/09/12/gia-chapter-1B-part-2
  - posts/2025/09/17/gia-chapter-1B-part-3A
  - posts/2025/10/05/gia-chapter-1B-part-3B
  - posts/2025/10/14/gia-chapter-1B-part-3C
  - posts/2025/10/23/gia-chapter-1B-part-4
  - posts/2025/11/03a/gia-chapter-1B-part-4B
  - posts/2025/11/14/gia-chapter-2A-spatial-autocorrelation
  - posts/2026/01/29/gia-chapter-2B-maup
  - posts/2026/04/29
  sort: "date"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 12
  feed:
    type: partial
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
This is one-stop shop listing page for all the posts of supporting material for [_Geographic Information Analysis_](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/book/10.1002/9780470549094) arranged in the order that the associated material shows up in the book.
